description.value:
You've achieved a full connection with the spirit of the rock, and the minerals meld with your body to aid you the moment you call. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Enlarge] once per hour as a 4th-rank primal innate spell targeting only yourself. When you do, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level for as long as the spell is in effect.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: One with the Stone]
